warnings: Electronic ΔG_solv only — no cavitation, dispersion-repulsion, or thermal correction. This is an electronic-energy difference E(solv) − E(gas), not a thermodynamic free energy (no ZPE/entropy).

Standard-state caveat: the value is NOT corrected to the conventional ΔG*_solv 1 M (gas) → 1 M (solution) state; the experimental tables you may compare against include a ~1.9 kcal/mol (RT ln 24.46) term this number omits. Do not compare directly to tabulated ΔG*_solv without adding it.
Semi-empirical implicit solvation is screening-grade; ±2–3 kcal/mol typical.

Single-conformer result: every species was evaluated at ONE geometry, with no conformational/Boltzmann averaging. For a flexible molecule the Boltzmann-averaged free energy over conformers can differ from a single conformer by several kcal/mol — shifting pKa by >1 unit, E° by >0.1 V, and logP by >0.5. If the molecule has rotatable bonds, run conformer-search first and average, or treat this as a screening estimate tied to the input geometry.

prose:
Method provenance:
Property: Electronic solvation free energy ΔG_solv (E_solv − E_gas)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical self-consistent tight-binding) as implemented in xtb (backend xtb, version as packaged in chemkit)
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the user-supplied acetamide.xyz coordinates (no further optimization)
Solvent model: implicit water with xtb’s ALPB continuum; no explicit solvent molecules
Charge / multiplicity: 0 / 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: xtb via chemkit solvation skill; CLI invocation recorded in result JSON
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged (integrity check passed); see warnings reproduced below for model limitations (electronic only, standard-state, single-conformer, semi-empirical accuracy). Density fitting is intrinsic to the GFN2-xTB Hamiltonian.
Live log: the run streamed to a file named solvation_<timestamp>.out in the caller’s working directory (announced when the job was launched); it contains the full SCF trace and can be `tail -f`’d for diagnostics.

Result:
ΔG_solv = −7.318564 kcal mol⁻¹ (electronic, single-conformer, implicit water, GFN2-xTB).

Reproducibility artifacts: optimized geometry not applicable (single point); result JSON at /var/folders/ym/_02kbfyd29z17l376783nlm00000gn/T/tmpinb67_c4/live.json. The headline number above is copied exactly from the tool’s delta_G_solv_kcal_mol field.
